title: Cinematic Skyscraper Rooftop Escape
description: A high-intensity action sequence prompt featuring operatives sprinting across a skyscraper roof before a glass floor collapses.
promptText:
Hyper-realistic cinematic action sequence, 15 seconds, aspect ratio 16:9.

Night. On the rooftop of a tall modern skyscraper, two anonymous operatives, one man and one woman, run side by side across the roof while a security team follows behind. Both operatives wear dark tactical clothing with full hoods or dark visors, faces mostly hidden in shadow. No clear facial close-ups, no celebrity resemblance, no famous actor look, no heroic movie-star face.

The rooftop is sleek and simple, with metal sections, vents, warning lights, and one large transparent glass section. The city glows far below with lights and light mist.
Wide opening shot: the two operatives sprint across the rooftop, staying close together. The security team is behind them and getting closer.

Tracking shot: the operatives run onto the glass section because it appears solid. Fine cracks suddenly spread under their feet. They react with surprise and try to keep balance.

Critical action beat: the glass section suddenly gives way beneath them. The floor disappears under their feet. They do not jump. They lose support unexpectedly and vanish downward through the opening as the glass breaks apart.
For a moment, it seems like they disappeared over the side of the skyscraper.

Final 5 seconds: the camera rushes toward the broken opening, reaches the edge, and looks down. It reveals that both operatives are still there, safely suspended below the roof by a maintenance line or support cable. Their bodies sway from the sudden stop as small glass fragments continue falling past them. One operative steadies the other while they hold onto the line beside the building.

Final moment: dramatic view of the two anonymous operatives suspended beside the skyscraper wall, with the glowing city below.

Style: hyper-realistic, cinematic, fast-paced, suspenseful, clear and readable action, strong sense of height, glass breaking, rooftop tension, dynamic camera movement, no visible face, no celebrity resemblance, no text, no logos, no cartoon style, no slow motion. Keep proportions. Keep style and features. Aspect ratio 16:9.

title: Frost Dragon Glacier Fortress Attack
description: A detailed cinematic brief for a dark-fantasy sequence where a colossal frost dragon attacks a glacial stronghold, specifying camera movement, lighting, and material physics for a high-budget CGI look.
promptText:
1. CREATION BRIEF

Generate an original 15-second dark-fantasy cinematic sequence in vertical 9:16 aspect ratio at 720p resolution. The video is a single sustained spectacle of a colossal pale bone-white frost dragon attacking a frozen mountain stronghold carved into a glacier cliff. The dragon is the unambiguous protagonist of every frame: it bursts up through a frozen lake in an explosion of shattered ice, climbs a sheer ice-clad fortress wall ripping through hanging defensive chains and frozen ballista nests, exhales a torrent of freezing breath that flash-rimes a watchtower into a brittle crystal husk, then slams its tail through that frozen tower so it shatters into glittering shards, before the camera pulls back to reveal a vast high-angle panorama of the glacial citadel cracking apart under a green aurora sky. The mood is cold, awe-inspiring, merciless, otherworldly. Pale aurora light battles deep arctic blue gloom throughout. Dense ice-fog and snow-spray roll across the frame, scattering aurora light into shimmering veils. Scale must read MASSIVE — the dragon is many times larger than any human, who appear as tiny dark fur-wrapped figures on the walls. Pacing is fast and kinetic with hard cuts on impacts, settling into a stabilized epic final reveal. Photoreal CGI, no stylization, no cartoon look. Every motion obeys heavy gravity and inertia.

2. STYLE BIBLE

Medium: realistic high-budget feature-film CGI, photoreal rendering, ray-traced lighting, physically based shading, subsurface scattering on ice and snow. Zero illustration or anime stylization, zero painterly look. Lens language: cinematic full-frame virtual cinematography, focal lengths roughly 24–50mm; wide anamorphic-feeling framing for the lake burst and climb beats, slightly longer for the breath and tail beats; shallow-to-medium depth of field with atmospheric ice-fog providing natural depth falloff and visible particulate. Color palette: a desaturated cold base of glacier blue, steel cyan, frost white, slate grey, deep teal shadow — punctuated by ethereal aurora greens and faint violets dancing overhead, with cold blue-white glow from the dragon's breath and occasional warm flickers of dying torchlight on the fortress walls (1900K) reading almost amber against the all-blue world. Lighting setup: key from a broad aurora-lit night sky (cool, roughly 7500–9000K, with animated green ribbon glow), strong cyan rim from glacier surfaces, bounce fill from snow, faint warm torch fill from defenders, brilliant cold pulse during the freeze-breath, harsh momentary highlights of refracted light when ice shatters. Texture/material rules: dragon hide is matte bone-white to pale-blue scale, dry and powdery with a frost dusting on the back plates, layered overlapping armored scutes along the spine; horns and head-crest are translucent bluish ice-crystal, internally refracting aurora light; wing membranes are pale milky leather, semi-translucent at thin edges with visible frozen vein structure backlit by the sky; thin rime crystals cling to the jaw and brow ridges and shed when it moves. Environment: glassy blue glacier ice with internal fracture lines and trapped bubbles, carved grey granite battlements, iron chains crusted with frost, frozen rope and timber ballistae, snow banks and wind-driven spindrift. Motion style: weighty deliberate wingbeats, explosive bursts on impacts, persistent realistic motion blur on fast pans, fine procedural snow-spray and ice-shard simulation, vapor of freezing breath rolling with believable turbulence.

3. CHARACTER / SUBJECT BIBLE

DRAGON — Silhouette: gigantic quadrupedal winged reptile distinct from any other beast — leaner and more serpentine than a bull-built dragon, a long sinuous neck, narrow angular skull crowned with a swept-back fan of translucent ice-crystal horns, a slim deep chest, long sail-finned tail, broad bat-like wings with frost-feathered trailing edges. Proportions: head narrow and elongated like a frozen wolf-skull, jaw long and lined with glassy teeth, legs long and lean with broad splayed clawed feet built to grip ice, talons clear and sharp like quartz. A continuous low crest of crystalline spines runs from the back of the skull down the neck and spine, longest at the shoulders, fanning into a thin translucent sail along the tail. Material/skin: matte bone-white to pale-blue scales with a permanent frost dusting, overlapping armored plating along the back, softer pebbled hide on throat and belly tinted faint cyan, dry surface catching aurora light as soft cold sheen rather than wet gloss. Wing membranes milky pale leather, fingered with long ice-rimed bony struts, edges glowing translucent blue when backlit by the sky. Eyes: pale ice-blue, slit-pupiled, glowing faintly from within, with minimal expressive range — base reptilian blinks and pupil tracking only; no humanlike emotion. Facial range: jaw opens and closes, nostrils vent visible cold vapor, lips peel slightly to show glassy teeth during exertion. Body language: serpentine, predatory, fluid in flight, explosive in attack; wings beat with deep deliberate downstrokes that visibly compress air and fling snow. Weight & balance: body reads as tons of mass — every landing compresses ice and cracks it, every wingbeat strains, tail counterbalances turns, neck leads movement. Contact points: talons grip and gouge ice, shoulders and tail-sail shatter chains and frozen timber, the tail-sweep demolishes the watchtower.

HUMANS — mountain defenders in heavy fur cloaks, frost-rimed mail, leather, and pale wool, rendered small and low-detail due to scale, appearing as dark scrambling silhouettes, falling bodies, and tumbling figures along the walls. No facial detail required; they exist to convey scale and chaos.

4. ENVIRONMENT / PROPS

Spatial layout: a fortress citadel carved into and atop a towering glacier cliff at night, with a frozen lake spreading at its base, terraced granite battlements, hanging iron chains strung with frozen warning bells, ballista nests built of frost-cracked timber, and a tall slender watchtower of stacked stone and ice rising above the walls. Background depth: receding glacier ridges and snow peaks into ice-fog distance, an aurora-banded night sky on the horizon. Surfaces: glassy fracture-veined ice, frost-crusted granite, iron chains, frozen rope, snow drifts, spindrift sheets blown across the frame. Props: hanging chains and frozen bells, frozen ballistae and bolts, defensive banners stiff with ice, snow-laden timber, loose ice blocks and rubble. Scale reference: the watchtower stands several stories tall yet is dwarfed by the dragon; defenders are ant-sized beside the beast. Physical constraints: ice shatters into glittering refractive shards and fine crystalline dust on impact, chains snap and whip with stored tension, granite fractures into rigid chunks raising frost-haze, frozen banners crack and crumble, freeze-breath rimes surfaces white and makes them brittle, gravity pulls all debris and bodies convincingly downward with arcing trajectories.

5. TIMECODED SHOT PLAN

00:00–00:04 — BURST FROM THE FROZEN LAKE. Frame: vertical composition, the frozen lake surface fills the lower two-thirds, the glacier fortress looming above against the aurora. Setup: a half-second of still cracked ice, hairline fractures spidering across the surface. Impact: the dragon's narrow skull and crystal horns erupt upward through the ice in a violent explosion of shattered plates and water-spray, neck driving skyward, frost crystals raining. Force/weight: tons of mass surging up, displaced ice slabs flung and arcing, spray sheeting outward. Facial: ice-blue eye snapping open, vapor venting from nostrils. Camera: low water-level angle looking up, sharp upward tilt following the rising skull, strong shake on the burst that decays in half a second. Lighting: cool aurora rim on the wet white scales, cyan glow from inside the cracked ice. Texture: r

title: Futuristic Subway Drone Chase
description: A high-speed cinematic drone chase sequence inside a futuristic subway tunnel with dynamic lighting and reflection effects.
promptText:
Drone Chase Through a Subway, Hyper-realistic cinematic action sequence, 15 seconds, aspect ratio 16:9.

Inside a futuristic subway tunnel at night, a rider on a sleek fast bike speeds through a simple underground route while two small pursuit drones follow behind. The rider wears a full helmet with dark visor and dark riding gear. No visible face.

Wide opening shot: the bike enters the subway tunnel at high speed, riding along a clear path beside the tracks. Two drones appear behind and begin following.

Side tracking shot: the rider leans into a smooth turn through the tunnel. The environment is simple and readable: concrete walls, support pillars, tunnel lights, cables, and reflections on the ground. The drones stay close behind.

Front three-quarter shot: the rider moves past support pillars and trackside structures while a subway train passes on a nearby track. Wind rushes through the tunnel and lights flash across the rider and bike.

Final 5 seconds: the rider accelerates deeper into the tunnel, threads through a tighter section with pillars, crosses a small gap or service path, lands smoothly, and keeps racing forward.

title: 2000s Korean Neighborhood DV Camcorder Vlog
description: A comprehensive video generation prompt for creating a nostalgic 2000s-style home video. It defines consistent character traits, setting details, and specific camera behaviors like handheld shake and autofocus hunting for an authentic aesthetic.
promptText:
15 seconds, 16:9. Main subject from @ image1 — lock her completely. Face, skin tone, body, outfit, everything stays identical the whole way through. She's wearing a grey faded sleeveless crop top, loose high-waist light blue jeans, black canvas sneakers, black cord necklace, black wavy hair in a messy side-swept ponytail with bangs. Korean woman, early-2000s feel.

The whole thing is shot in a quiet Korean residential neighborhood — narrow concrete alleys, low-rise houses with small terraces, a front yard with a clothesline, potted plants, parked bicycles and motorcycles, big trees, and overhead cables everywhere. No shops, no vendors, nothing commercial. Just a real neighborhood.

Camera treatment is the whole point. This needs to look like someone's friend grabbed a DV camcorder and just started recording — no plan, no setup, no nothing. Heavy handheld shake, constant reframing, subject drifting toward the edges, autofocus hunting, lens breathing, exposure pumping. The image itself should look faded, low contrast, slightly washed out, with that digital noise and compression feel that early-2000s home video had. No stabilization. No modern grading. This aesthetic is non-negotiable.

She starts sitting on a concrete sidewalk fixing her ponytail, arms raised, genuine smile, wind catching her hair — camera barely holding focus. Then the camera follows her into a narrow alley where she crouches down and feeds a stray cat that comes right up to her. After that she's in her front yard hanging laundry on the clothesline, morning breeze moving everything, camera swaying and hunting. Mid-section she's on the front terrace with a coffee cup, just sitting quietly, looking out at the street — loose drifting shot from the side. Then a right-side close shot where she raises her arm, waves warmly toward someone off-frame and says "Annyeong" — camera catches it a beat late. Final shot is a slow tracking walk down the street, coffee cup in hand, she notices the lens, turns slightly and gives a real quiet smile — then the recording just cuts to black mid-motion like the camcorder got switched off.

Audio is strictly natural. Morning birds, light breeze, distant motorcycle sounds, faint neighborhood chatter, cat, coffee cup, footsteps on concrete, leaves. No music, no sound design, nothing added.

title: VTuber Style Cooking Live Video
description: A comprehensive prompt for generating a cooking commentary video that features a VTuber-style character overlay and realistic cooking visuals for Black Pepper Beef.
promptText: Use the character from the reference image as a VTuber-style live commentary avatar. Maintain the impression of a green polygonal mask, black borders, narrow eyes, black eyebrows, a large purple tongue, a white head, and black clothes. The character is overlaid as a small 2D/Live2D-style streamer avatar in the bottom right of the screen, not interfering with the background cooking video. The avatar shows only the upper body, with light vertical swaying, blinking, lip-syncing, facial expression changes, witty remarks, and reactions. The video is a cooking commentary showing the preparation of Qingjiao Rousi (Black Pepper Beef with Peppers). The main screen is live-action or cinematic cooking footage. Thinly slice bell peppers, bamboo shoots, and beef or pork on a cutting board. Include realistic sounds of the knife, oil splashing, the wok shaking, and ingredients frying. The cooking process follows: seasoning the meat, coating with starch, cutting peppers and bamboo shoots, stir-frying meat on high heat, adding vegetables, seasoning with oyster sauce, soy sauce, sake, and sugar, and finally stir-frying until glossy and plating. The screen layout is game/cooking stream style. The main cooking video is full screen with the VTuber avatar fixed at the bottom right. A small 'COOKING LIVE' style UI can be shown in the top left, but do not use real service logos. If subtitles or comments are included, place them subtly as a fictional UI. No UI is needed if text is unnecessary. Avatar commentary: 'Hey everyone, today we're making Qingjiao Rousi.' 'First, slice the peppers thinly. If you're sloppy here, it's all over.' 'Season the meat and lock in the umami with starch. This is quietly important.' 'The wok needs high heat. The sound is already a win.' 'The moment the peppers go in, the color turns it into a dish instantly.' 'Adding oyster sauce is a guaranteed win. The scent is cheating.' 'And it's done. White rice, please run away.' Avatar reaction effects: when the slicing is done perfectly, the avatar narrows its eyes and nods. When frying on high heat, the avatar leans forward slightly and lip-syncs excitedly. When the sauce is added and steam rises, the avatar emphasizes the purple tongue and is surprised, saying 'This looks good.' At completion, the avatar claps smallly at the bottom right and nods satisfactorily. Video style: high-quality cooking footage, clean kitchen, natural or warm lighting. Make ingredient colors look vibrant. Emphasize the oil's glow, steam, sauce gloss, and pepper green. The camera switches between close-ups of hands, top-down cooking surface shots, low-angle wok shots, and plating close-ups. The VTuber avatar is always fixed at the bottom right, with consistent size and position. It must not block the cooking footage. Prohibitions: Do not change character face or mask design. Do not change tongue color. Do not turn into a different character. Do not make the avatar a live person. Do not use real streaming service logos. Do not skip cooking steps too much. Ensure hands and avatar do not overlap awkwardly. Ingredients must not transform into other dishes mid-way. The finished product must be clearly recognizable as Qingjiao Rousi, with thin-sliced meat, peppers, bamboo shoots, and a brown glossy sauce.

title: Ancient Chinese Woman Cinematic Video Prompt

promptText:
FIRST FRAME (= upload reference image, 100% locked):

Ancient Chinese woman, golden hairpin with pearl tassels over her face, crimson and gold-embroidered outer robe over white inner garment, holding a landscape folding fan and a branch of white plum/cherry blossom; standing in a corridor with red pillars, golden side light at sunset, ginkgo leaves falling, reflections on the wet bluestone ground. The character's facial features, hairstyle, clothing, accessories, fan pattern, and composition are 100% consistent with the first frame, with no deformation or face-swapping throughout.

Character · Expression · Action · Dialogue (Emotional scene, mouth movements strictly aligned with dialogue):

0-2s: Slightly lowers head and gaze, eyes on the folding fan, corners of the mouth holding a reserved, subtle smile.
[Softly · Breathily] "The wind in this corridor has picked up again."

2-4s: The smile slowly fades, head lifts slightly, gaze shifts to the right side of the frame, expression becomes serious.
[Slight pause] "You said... you would come back to see the leaves cover these steps."

4-6s: A trace of faint doubt and worry appears in the eyes, lips move slightly as if wanting to speak but stopping—do not frown.
[Sentence cut short] "Now..." (Voice stops, unfinished)

6-8s: Gaze slowly sinks, quiet disappointment, eyes dimming, no tears.

8-10s: Lowers head and slightly closes eyes, corners of the mouth forming an extremely faint, self-mocking smile.

10-12s: Looks up toward the warm light, expression restrained, eyes gentle but aggrieved.

All 11 opponents wear white and blue uniforms; their goalkeeper wears a green long-sleeved jersey and gloves.

Music: Low, fast electronic drum beats and low-frequency stadium bass, like a heartbeat.

Style: Realistic live-action footage — looks like a real television broadcast of a match, not an animation. Real skin with pores, sweat, and faces reddened from exertion; real fabric that wrinkles, fits closely, and moves with action; real blades of grass, divots, splashes, and mud; real motion blur during fast pans, shallow depth of field in close-ups, natural floodlight colors. Real physics — momentum, weight, balance, real ball spin, and net deformation. No anime, no cartoon, no cel-shading, no illustration or digital painting; no flat color blocks, no plastic game CG, no smooth commercial rendering.

Shot 1 (0:00-0:02): Medium close-up, 28mm, near grass level, side view / He (see @Image1) dribbles into the white-and-blue defense. His right foot circles the ball twice in a step-over feint. He drops his outer shoulder; the first defender follows. He pushes with the outside of his right foot, then cuts back with the inside. title: Cinematic Rainy City Sword Action
description: An incredibly detailed multi-shot cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a magical swordsman fighting obsidian magical soldiers in a rainy intersection.
promptText:
The enemies are not living beings, but unmanned magical soldiers made of obsidian and metal. They have black polyhedral armor, horn-like protrusions, and blue glowing magic cores. The interiors consist only of stone, gears, and blue light.

The soldiers are irregularly scattered on roads, around vehicles, in side alleys, on walls, and on elevated tracks. Their size, orientation, distance, and posture vary slightly, and they are not arranged in equal intervals or symmetry. Each moves at different speeds and timings, running, leaping, zig-zagging, moving along walls, or stopping to aim.

Shot 1 (0–4s):
A rainy intersection. Lyra is in the foreground left, while magical soldiers are naturally scattered from the mid-ground to the background on the right. The camera moves close to Lyra across puddle reflections, passes her side, and shows the soldiers activating separately throughout the city. Blue magic cores light up in an irregular sequence.

Shot 2 (4–10s):
Lyra accelerates, splashing water. The camera moves low and parallel to her. As Lyra's sword passes through the soldiers' armor, blue cracks run along the obsidian shell following the slash line. In the next moment, the soldier shatters into geometric stone fragments and metal parts, and the internal blue magic vanishes into the sky as particles of light.

Lyra crushes a rushing leg-type, and shatters a zig-zagging type with a horizontal sweep. She rolls between two jumping from a car, stands up, and releases a pale blue slash. She destroys a descending individual from a wall with an aerial spin cut. Shattered obsidian pieces slide across the road, splashing rainwater.

Shot 3 (10–15s):
Numerous magical soldiers close in on Lyra. The front three raise their arms within sword range, mid-ground individuals approach from the sides, and a large distant individual is charging. Always keep Lyra and the approaching enemies in the same frame.

Lyra holds her sheathless sword low in her right hand. Pale blue light concentrates on the blade. Just before the front three attack, Lyra rotates her waist and releases a massive 180-degree horizontal fan-shaped shockwave. 

From a wide side angle, show Lyra, the sword, the enemies in front, and the shockwave simultaneously. The shockwave advances from front to back, carving a blue crack into the obsidian armor. With a split-second delay, they shatter chain-link style from near to far. Hundreds of obsidian fragments, metal pieces, and blue light particles cover the rainy intersection, reflecting the neon streetlights.

As the final large individual collapses into massive stone pieces, the blue magic core quietly goes out. Only Lyra stands at the intersection, lowering her sword and exhaling. Shattered obsidian pieces are hit by rain, and her white dress slowly settles.

Important:
Maintain consistency of enemies as unmanned stone and metal structures. When destroyed, draw only obsidian fragments, metal parts, and blue light particles. Do not depict soft body expressions or organic internal structures.

The final massive slash must be released at the moment multiple soldiers close in and enter their attack motion. Do not release the slash after enemies have disappeared or toward an empty road.

title: National Geographic Style Chameleon Macro Documentary
description: A highly detailed video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 that mimics a National Geographic macro documentary. It features a chameleon in a Madagascar rainforest, showcasing its camouflage, eye movement, skin texture, and a 1000fps slow-motion capture of it hunting a grasshopper.
promptText:
[Style] National Geographic Macro Wildlife documentary, 4K UHD, macro photography (Laowa 24mm Macro Probe Lens), ultra-high-speed slow motion (Phantom TMX 1000fps), cinematic natural light, shallow depth of field.
[Duration] 10 seconds
[Scene] Madagascar rainforest canopy, on a thick branch covered in lichen and wet moss. The background features layered deep green leaves blurred into uniform bokeh, with a few beams of sunlight piercing the canopy to create contrast on the branch.
[00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Perfect Camouflage (Slow Lateral Tracking, Macro Close-Up)
A slow macro lateral track gradually reveals a veiled chameleon hidden in the moss. Its body is a dark green nearly identical to the moss, remaining motionless.
Skin Macro Detail: Each tubercular scale looks like a miniature gemstone facet, with subtle specular highlights at the tips and deeper dark green in the grooves between scales. The surface of the casque is rough and dry, like weathered rock in miniature.
Eye Close-up: Two turreted eyeballs rotate independently and slowly—left eye forward, right eye backward. The eyes are covered in scaled circular eyelids, leaving only a tiny central hole for the pupil. The iris has a precise golden-brown radial fiber texture, and the pupil is a tiny, pitch-black pinhole.
Forepaw Detail: The five toes are divided into groups of two and three to form pincers gripping the branch. The rough pads, texture of the toe bottoms, and tiny curved claws are clearly visible.
[00:04-00:07] Shot 2: Color Change Lock-On (Push-In to Head, Split Diopter Focus)
The camera slowly pushes into the side of the head. Both eyes suddenly turn toward the same direction—a bright green grasshopper 30cm ahead on a leaf vein.
Color Change Process (Core 4K Test Point): Starting from the tail, the scales light up like an LED matrix, changing from dark green to bright yellow-green in a wave. Each scale changes independently, first with the base color lightening, then yellow pigment spots appearing on the surface. As the color wave passes the mid-body, a transition zone is visible—single scales momentarily half-green and half-yellow.
Body Movement: The hind feet tighten their grip on the branch, claws carving tiny curved scratches in the bark, with a few bits of bark debris falling. The whole body leans forward 5 degrees extremely slowly to build tension, and the throat swells slightly.
[00:07-00:10] Shot 3: Slingshot Kill (Ultra High-Speed 1000fps, Side Profile Macro)
Side profile ultra-high-speed macro shot: The mouth opens to reveal a pinkish-white interior, and the muscles at the base of the tongue contract suddenly—
Slingshot Process (Slow Motion): The pink elastic tongue shoots out at 1.5 times the body length, extending like an unfolding spring in the air. The tip of the tongue is a bulbous mucus pad covered in papillary microstructures.
Hit Moment: The mucus pad precisely engulfs the grasshopper. Transparent silk-like mucus threads are seen stretching between the prey and the tongue surface, refracting subtle rainbow colors in the backlight.
Retraction: The tongue retracts at the same speed, pulling the grasshopper into the mouth. The chameleon closes its mouth, its jaws moving slowly as it chews. Final frame: One eyeball slowly turns toward the camera, pupil slightly dilating—freeze frame.

Slow motion captures the instant of impact — the bird punches through the mirror surface and a crown of water bursts outward in a perfect ring, individual droplets hanging suspended in the air, each one catching the light like a glass bead. A translucent nictitating membrane sweeps across the eye a split second before contact.
[00:07-00:10] Shot 3: The Strike (Extreme close-up, macro lens)
Extreme macro close-up: the moment the talons close on the trout — scaled yellow toes spreading apart, black hooked claws sinking through flashing silver fish-scales, a thin sheet of water peeling off the feathers. Shallow depth of field blurs the spray streaking past the lens. Freeze-frame on a single droplet rolling off the tip of a claw, the fish's gill flaring open, cold light glinting on the soaked, curved talon.

Scene: Late night in a luxurious imperial bedroom, a giant dragon bed with gold silk curtains, moonlight streaming through the window, candlelight flickering in contrast with the cool blue moonlight, faint white mist floating in the air.

Characters: The male lead is a tall, cold, and overbearing emperor with sharp facial contours, sword-like eyebrows, and deep eyes carrying strong pressure, wearing a black dragon robe with gold trim; the female lead is a white cat girl after transformation, with snow-white long hair and cute cat ears, brown eyes with light purple eyeshadow, exquisite makeup like a ball-jointed doll, wearing a white gauze dress, with a slender figure and a lazy yet stubborn temperament; the Empress Dowager is a majestic, harsh, and beautiful middle-aged woman in phoenix crown and robes, with a sharp gaze; the assassin is a lean, handsome middle-aged man with a cold aura and eyes sharp as a knife.

Style: Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high-end ancient style fashion photography texture, cinematic color grading, extreme details, fine hair on cat ears swaying slightly in the wind.

Storyboards:
0-3s: The emperor sits alone by the dragon bed, his cold profile deeply etched in the moonlight, hand gently stroking the snow-white cat beside him.
3-6s: The white cat curls up comfortably in his arms, the emperor rarely showing a soft gaze.
6-9s: Cut to the Empress Dowager's chambers, her beautiful face filled with harsh anger, slamming the table: 'The Emperor sleeps with a cat every night and refuses the selection, find out why immediately!'
9-12s: Several eunuchs bow and withdraw, the screen quickly cuts to the black-clad assassin sneaking into the palace.
12-15s: The assassin's figure approaches the bedroom like a ghost, the emperor looks up alertly, and the white cat suddenly leaps up in warning.

Second Segment (15-30s):
15-18s: The assassin breaks through the window, long blade aimed at the white cat, the emperor instantly stands to shield the cat behind him.
18-21s: The white cat erupts in blinding white light under the moonlight, instantly transforming into a beautiful girl with cat ears, gauze dancing, brown eyes especially charming under light purple eyeshadow.
21-24s: The assassin's eyes turn from murderous intent to amazement and infatuation, the blade stopping mid-air.
24-27s: The cat-ear girl lands lightly, tail swaying slightly, looking up at the emperor with stubborn eyes.
27-30s: The emperor's gaze darkens, speaking in a low, overbearing voice: 'Dare to touch my cat, you seek death.'

Third Segment (30-45s):
30-33s: The cat-ear girl chuckles, cat ears twitching, taking the initiative to stand in front of the emperor, her exquisite makeup perfect like a porcelain doll in the moonlight.
33-36s: The assassin steps forward dazed, voice trembling: 'Young lady... what kind of fairy are you?'
36-39s: The emperor pulls the girl back into his arms, coldly scanning the assassin: 'She is mine, no one shall touch her.'
39-42s: The cat-ear girl looks up at the emperor, her gaze turning from stubbornness to attachment, whispering: 'Your Majesty... do you still want to hold me to sleep tonight?'
42-45s: The emperor's mouth curls slightly, leaning close to her ear, saying in an extremely low, overbearing tone: 'Not just tonight, you won't escape any night hereafter.' The camera lingers on their tension-filled gaze and the assassin's dazed expression.

title: 1980s Sitcom Nostalgia Scene
description: A comprehensive prompt for creating a nostalgic 1980s sitcom scene, including visual aesthetics, dialogue, and specific camera movements.
promptText:
A cozy suburban living room in 1987. Warm tungsten lamps, wood paneling, houseplants, VHS tapes, and a bulky CRT television create an authentic 1980s atmosphere. A handsome 18-year-old young man with feathered hair and a denim jacket sits on a plaid couch beside a pretty 18-year-old young woman with curly shoulder-length hair, pastel sweater, and jeans. They are relaxed, smiling and talking like lifelong friends. The scene has the look of a classic prime-time sitcom, with soft film grain, slight VHS color bleed, and gentle audience laughter after humorous moments.

The camera starts in a medium two-shot with subtle dolly movement. Both actors have natural eye contact, realistic facial expressions, blinking, and casual hand gestures. Warm practical lighting and slight halation around bright lamps evoke Kodak film stock.

Dialogue:

Young man (thoughtfully):
 "You know, maybe someday computers will get smart enough to help make movies."
Young woman (laughing softly):
 "Movies? Come on. You mean like robots writing scripts and making whole scenes?"

Young man:
 "Yeah, maybe. Imagine typing an idea and watching it come to life."
Young woman (smiling):
 "That sounds crazy. I wonder if AI will ever be able to make movies."

They exchange amused looks and laugh together. The audience chuckles lightly. The camera slowly pushes in as the CRT television flickers in the background.
Visual Style

Authentic 1980s sitcom aesthetics
Kodak 5247 film stock colors

Soft halation and analog grain

Multi-camera sitcom lighting
Gentle dolly camera movement
Natural lip sync and facial expressions
Slight VHS artifacts and color bloom
Cozy nostalgic mood
Subtle audience laughter track
Live-action realism

title: Wuxia Action Duel Between Chinese and Japanese Swordsmen
description: A highly detailed cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a choreographed combat sequence between a Chinese swordsman and a Japanese martial artist in a sunset courtyard setting.
promptText:
[Style] Wuxia action film, photorealistic cinematic quality, IMAX quality, 8K Ultra HD, ramp-mo transitions, sharp editing style, 2 people on screen.

[Duration] 15 seconds

[Scene] An empty stone plaza outdoors at dusk with backlight. Scattered broken stone pillars, shallow puddles on the ground, orange-red sunset sky, a breeze swirling withered leaves.

[Characters] Chinese Swordsman @Image 1 (East Asian female with deep brown long hair and bangs, wearing an off-white knitted cardigan with deep blue stripes on the cuffs, beige camisole, brown plaid skirt, black stockings, dark loafers, holding a Chinese ring-pommel broadsword in her right hand); Japanese Swordsman @Image 2 (East Asian female with pink curly twin tails, wearing a pink cherry blossom pattern kimono, dark red wide obi with gold cord knots, holding a Japanese katana with both hands).

[00:00-00:03] Shot 1: Silent Standoff — Extreme Close-up

Cross Cut: Close-up of the Chinese swordsman's eyes—pupils suddenly contract, eyelashes tremble slightly; cut to close-up of the Japanese swordsman's eyes—sharp gaze, mouth slightly tightening.

Low Angle Close-up: Chinese swordsman grips the hilt tightly with her right hand, knuckles turning white; cut to Japanese swordsman slowly raising the katana to shoulder level, the kimono's wide sleeves draping down.

Panoramic: The two stand five paces apart, silhouetted against the light. A withered leaf falls between them—the moment the leaf touches the ground, both charge simultaneously, the puddles exploding into spray.

[00:03-00:07] Shot 2: First Round Exchange / Four Consecutive Strikes — Steadicam Tracking

Arc Shot 180°: Chinese swordsman rushes close, the ring-pommel sword swinging diagonally upward from the right low position, the blade cutting through the air with a sharp wind sound; Japanese swordsman parries vertically with her katana, the collision of the two blades producing a shower of practical sparks, the impact blowing both their hair back.

Quick Cut: Japanese swordsman uses the momentum of the parry to spin, her katana tracing an arc in a backhand horizontal sweep; Chinese swordsman leans back to dodge, the blade tip grazing the tip of her bangs as hair strands are tossed by the airflow.

Medium Shot: Chinese swordsman counters immediately before stabilizing, using the ring-pommel sword to block upward. The back of her blade clashes with the katana again, with sparks and water droplets splashing in front of the lens.

[00:07-00:11] Shot 3: Escalated Combat / Suppression and Counter — Slow-mo to Ramp

Super Slow-mo: Japanese swordsman leaps high, her kimono hem spreading like an umbrella in the air. She holds the katana with both hands overhead, slashing down with full force. The golden waist rope traces an arc in the air.

Speed Ramp (Slow to Normal): Chinese swordsman kneels on one knee, holding the ring-pommel sword horizontally overhead to catch the blow—the enormous force causes the stone floor to crack radially beneath her knee, and puddles are thrown into a circular water wall by the shockwave.

Close-up: Chinese swordsman looks up from the gap where the blades are locked, her expression turning from endurance to ferocity as she grit her teeth and forcibly repels the katana.

[00:11-00:15] Shot 4: Final Rush — Freeze Frame

Panoramic/High-Speed Photography: Both retreat three steps to gather strength. Chinese swordsman holds her sword in a reverse grip low at her waist; Japanese swordsman holds her katana at her right shoulder in an Iaido stance.

Symmetrical Shot: Both rush at each other with full strength, the cardigan hem and kimono sleeves flapping wildly. Their footsteps kick up two parallel waves in the puddles.

Freeze Frame: The moment they cross in the center of the frame, everything stops—the Chinese swordsman's blade has swept past the Japanese swordsman's side, and the katana has passed the Chinese swordsman. Shattered water droplets and sparks are suspended between them, colored gold by the backlight. The dusk light penetrates between their intersecting bodies, with clothes and hair frozen in the wind.

title: Elevator Celebrity Encounter POV
description: A highly detailed multi-shot video prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to create a realistic first-person perspective of meeting a celebrity in an elevator, emphasizing specific button interactions and character consistency.
promptText:
Overall Style: First-person smartphone handheld feel, authentic elevator interior view, lifestyle short video, slight camera shake, ordinary indoor white ceiling light, like a candid elevator encounter. Use the woman from the reference image as the main character, keeping her face, hairstyle, facial features, body proportions, and temperament consistent.

Core Plot:
The camera holder is in the elevator filming with a phone. The elevator doors are slowly closing, the gap getting narrower. Through the gap, a beautiful woman is seen approaching the elevator from the hallway. The camera holder suddenly gets nervous and hurriedly turns the lens to the elevator button panel, pressing the 'open door' button multiple times. This button is not a text button, but an icon with two arrows pointing outward. The doors reopen, and the woman enters the elevator.

Shot 1 (0-2s)
Subject: Elevator doors closing slowly with the reference woman appearing outside the gap.
Action: 0-1s: First-person view from inside, filming the doorway vertically. 1-2s: The woman is seen running or walking from the hallway, noticed by the filmer.
Environment: Modern apartment/office elevator lobby, gray tile floor, white walls, hallway lights, metal door frame.
Style: Authentic phone capture, slight jitter, sense of urgency.
Constraint: Must show doors closing with the lead appearing in the gap.

Shot 2 (2-4s)
Subject: Filmer's hand and button panel.
Action: 2-2.5s: Lens turns hurriedly to the panel with rapid movement. 2.5-4s: Finger presses the open button 3-5 times rapidly. The button has a two-arrow icon and lights up with a green ring.
Environment: Metal elevator wall, circular floor buttons, reflection on the panel.
Style: Nervous, hasty, authentic reaction.
Constraint: No text on buttons (no 'Open', etc.); must be the two-arrow icon.

Shot 3 (4-7s)
Subject: Doors reopen, the woman enters.
Action: 4-5s: Lens turns back to the door as it reopens. 5-7s: The woman reaches the door, looks at the camera, and enters.
Style: Lifestyle encounter, slight motion blur.
Constraint: Lead must be the reference image woman.

Shot 4 (7-11s)
Subject: The woman standing in the elevator.
Action: 7-9s: She stands near the metal wall, adjusting her posture. 9-11s: She looks at the lens, smiles slightly or turns naturally.
Style: Lifestyle smartphone capture, subtle beauty filter feel but not over-processed.
Constraint: Single lead only, consistent with reference image identity.

Negative Prompts: Buttons showing text ('Open', etc.), Chinese or English text on buttons, wrong icons, doors staying open without a closing process, no sense of urgency, no repeated button pressing, overly stable camera, lead appearing out of thin air, lead not entering, failed face swap, facial drifting, changing features/hair/proportions, extra fingers, distorted elevator space, garbled text, subtitles, logo, watermark, anime style, CG animation feel, over-cinematic.

title: Brutal Viking Berserker Action Cinema
description: A high-intensity video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a continuous tracking shot of a Viking berserker's rampage through a village with realistic physics and motion blur.
promptText:
[STYLE + CAMERA + ATMOSPHERE]
Brutal 2026 Viking action cinema with hyper-realistic grounded fight choreography and heavy physics. Single continuous dynamic tracking shot following a massive fat berserker as he rampages through a Viking village, systematically taking down villagers with brutal force and his axe until he reaches his longhouse, discovers his wife's betrayal and explodes in full berserk rage. Anamorphic lens, subtle film grain, cold northern daylight, intense motion blur, stabilized professional handheld camera.

[IMAGE REFERENCES]
Generate consistent character: late-30s massive fat but powerfully built Viking berserker, long wild hair and thick beard, intense wild eyes, covered in Norse tattoos and scars, heavy belly but thick muscular arms. Wears dirty fur cloak over bare scarred chest, leather pants, heavy boots and carries a large blood-stained axe. Exact same appearance, body type, clothing and weapon throughout.

[TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND]
0-4s: [Continuous Dynamic Tracking Shot] Camera tracks backward through the muddy village center as the berserker advances with growing rage. Several villagers try to stop him; he swings his heavy axe in brutal arcs, cleaving one and throwing another into a longhouse wall with raw power. Heavy impacts, bodies reacting with realistic weight. Camera tight on his massive frame.

4-8s: [Continuous Dynamic Tracking Shot with subtle lateral orbit] Pushes deeper between longhouses. Uses his massive size to bull-rush and crush one against a post, then delivers devastating axe strikes. Fabric, fur and blood move realistically. Growing intensity. Camera orbits slightly while tracking his advance.

8-12s: [Continuous Dynamic Tracking Shot - Building Rage] Approaches his longhouse area, smashing through a door with his body and axe, throws a villager into a fire pit. His movements become more unhinged. Camera tracks forward as destruction builds.

12-15s: [Continuous Dynamic Tracking Shot - Berserk Explosion] Reaches his longhouse and sees his wife with another man. Full berserk rage erupts. He charges with animalistic fury, axe swinging in devastating blows. Camera stays locked on the explosion of violence as he advances, then slowly pulls back revealing the trail of carnage through the village. Seamless continuous take, peak visceral energy.

[STYLE & QUALITY BOOSTERS]
Photorealistic 8K, ultra-detailed skin, fabric, fur, wood and blood textures with realistic sweat, dirt and impact, perfect coherent physics on all strikes, throws, body impacts and environmental destruction, flawless motion blur, stable character consistency, no artifacts, professional blockbuster film look, high dynamic range, intense visceral action, cold northern color palette.

title: Jungle Supply Convoy Snake Ambush
description: A detailed action-oriented video prompt for a cinematic sequence showing a giant python attacking an army truck convoy in a muddy rainforest, complete with specific shot directions and sound cues.
promptText:
A muddy dirt track through thick green rainforest in grey daylight. An army supply convoy of trucks drives along the narrow track, jungle pressing in on both sides. A giant python, thick as a bus with dark green scales, has wrapped around the last truck and is dragging it backward into the trees. At the front, a gunner stands at a mounted gun on the lead gun-truck. Sound: roaring engines, groaning metal, soldiers shouting, snake hissing, rifle fire, radio voices.

Shot 1 (0–3s) — THE HOOK: Low rear shot in the mud. The giant python squeezes the last truck and hauls it backward off the track into the trees, wheels sliding in the mud. Soldiers on the truck fire their rifles into the thick coils, but the bullets do nothing. The rear driver wrestles his wheel and shouts into his radio: “IT’S PULLING ME INTO THE TREES!”

Shot 2 (3–6s): At the front of the convoy. The gunner swings his mounted gun around to point back down the line, but holds his fire — the snake is wrapped on the truck with men still on it. He calls on the radio: “Cut your trailer! Get it on the track!”

Shot 3 (6–9s): At the rear truck. The driver pulls the trailer release. The truck breaks free and lurches forward onto the track — and the python, still wrapped around the heavy trailer, is yanked out of the trees with it, spilling onto the open muddy track, rearing its head up in the clear.

Shot 4 (9–13s) — BIG SLOW-MOTION MOMENT: The snake is out in the open on the track now. The lead gunner opens fire. Bullet time — a long stream of heavy rounds flies down the line in slow motion, smoke and shell cases hanging in the air, tearing into the coiled python, mud and broken branches bursting up around it.

Shot 5 (13–15s): Time snaps back. The python drops and lies still across the muddy track beside the wrecked trailer, smoke rising off it. The freed rear truck pulls up the line to the others, soldiers climbing down into the mud. Smoke drifts through the trees. Cut.

title: Monochrome Text City Surreal Transformation
description: A surreal monochrome art-film prompt where city buildings are covered in handwritten text that detaches and transforms into weather phenomena like lightning and birds.
promptText:
A vast monochrome city under a blank white sky. Every building facade is covered with handwritten words in black ink poems, warnings, names, unfinished sentences. The streets are empty except for loose paper drifting across the pavement.

Opening frame: the camera glides down a silent boulevard between towering buildings covered in text. The ink moves slightly, as if breathing.

At the 2-second mark, one word detaches from a wall.

It floats into the air and becomes a cloud.

Then thousands of words peel away from buildings, rising into the sky. Some become rain, some become birds, some become lightning, some become black snow. Sentences unravel into long ribbon storms that whip through the streets.

The camera follows a single phrase as it transforms into a tornado of letters, pulling street signs, papers, and window reflections into its spiral.

VFX escalation: the weather becomes linguistic. Rain falls as tiny punctuation marks. Thunder appears as giant words flashing across the sky. Fog forms from erased sentences.

Velocity ramp: a lightning bolt made of handwritten text strikes the street , individual letters suspended in mid-impact, glowing white against the monochrome city.

Final moment: all text vanishes from the buildings, leaving the city completely blank. A single new word appears on the ground beneath the camera: REMEMBER.

Experimental typographic surrealism, monochrome art-film aesthetic, ink particle simulation, atmospheric word-weather VFX, cinematic minimalism, 4K.
